title: Betting with Ghost: The Gem Hunter
original_title: Làm Giàu Với Ma 2: Cuộc Chiến Hột Xoàn
overview: Five individuals embark on a darkly comedic journey, each with their own schemes, to transport the body of actress Anh Thu (Ngoc Xuan) back to her hometown. In return, her ghost promises them a diamond ring worth 9 billion VND. Who will claim the prize, or will the trip reveal their darkest selves?
